article.title: FTX law firm Fenwick & West to pay $54M to victims in settlement
article.summary: The law firm agreed to a settlement in February 2026 and is facing a separate $525 million lawsuit over its role in the collapse of the FTX crypto exchange.

headline: Ethereum Plunges, $7.35B Wiped from Tom Lee's Holdings

article.title: Tom Lee’s Ethereum portfolio down $7.35B as ETH price outlook worsens
article.summary: ETH’s bearish chart setup points to a 25% drop toward $1,600, risking over $10 billion in paper losses for BitMine in the coming weeks.

headline: Paz Protests Threaten $10B Investment Ahead of Key Talks

article.title: Paz Says Protests Test Democracy Ahead of Talks
article.summary: Bolivia President Rodrigo Paz tells Wall Street Week why pragmatism — not ideology — will define his government, and why closing the chapter on 20 years of one-party rule won’t be easy. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: 1M Barrels Iraq Crude Exit Persian Gulf Amid Talks

article.title: Supertanker With Iraq Crude Exits Persian Gulf as Talks Continue
article.summary: A supertanker hauling Iraqi crude to China has left the Persian Gulf and crossed the US blockade line into the Arabian Sea, as talks continue to end the war between the US and Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
